title: Stardom's Skys
description: This mods is an addon for Stardom's Extreme End adding a new dimension and gear.
body:
![logo banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/957773377e606eb7dd97a9e3ac89c362ddaaa55d.png)

This mod is an addon for Stardom's Extreme End which adds a whole new dimension to explore after The End. Currently this mod includes:

- The Skylands Dimension
- Mysterious Eye Structure
  - Used to obtain Mysterious End Stone for the Skylands portal
- Abyssal Tower Structure
- The Abyssal Plains Biome
- The Fungal Plains Biome
- The Abyssal Forrest Biome
- Sapphire Armor/Tools
  - Step up from Draconic Armor/Tools
- Demonic Armor/Tools
  - Step up from Sapphire Armor/Tools
- Abyss
  - An extremely strong water-themed Blaze variant
  - Found at Abyss Spawner structures
